---
title: "resolve_family"
generated: true
description: "Resolve a `str` name (a built-in) or a `Family` instance to a family."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:resolve_family -->
```python
resolve_family(family: Union[str, Family]) -> Family
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:resolve_family -->
Resolve a `str` name (a built-in) or a `Family` instance to a family.

`glm_fit` / `gam_fit` accept either; a string is looked up in the
built-in registry (`'gaussian'` / `'binomial'` / `'poisson'` /
`'gamma'` / `'negbinomial'`).  `'negbinomial'` resolves to the default
`alpha = 1`; for another dispersion pass `negbinomial(alpha)` directly.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:resolve_family -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `family` | `Union[str, Family]` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Family`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
